executives.name: George Brack
executives.background: Mr. Brack has over 30 years of experience in the mining investment banking and corporate development sectors. He was previously the Managing Director and Industry Head, Mining at BMO Nesbitt Burns.

executives.name: George Paspalas
executives.background: Mr. Paspalas is the President and CEO of MAG Silver Corp. He has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

executives.name: Paul Kostuik
executives.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.
